title: hieracium glabratum subsp. ozanonis
intro: Hieracium glabratum subsp. ozanonis, also known as Ozanon's Hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium glabratum subsp. ozanonis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant may involve infusions or teas, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
